message:
feat(fwc): add MCP server module with JSON-RPC routing (116 tests)

Implement serve_mcp.rs for CUAL-A.3: MCP server exposing connectors as
tools via JSON-RPC 2.0. Includes protocol types, server state with
builder API, and request handler routing for initialize, tools/list,
tools/call, resources/list, resources/read, prompts/list, prompts/get.
Pure data layer — transport (stdio/SSE) is separate.

Fix clippy across 7 other fwc modules: redundant_clone, sort on
primitive type, case-sensitive file extension comparison.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
